It's a subtle but needed change to satisfy your inner warmonger, 101%!

State.Author: Rougeshot
State.Description: A must have for Lycanthrope lovers this mod transforms the cartoon-like proportions of the vanilla Werewolves to a creepier and more realistically proportioned  Man-beast , by replacing the vanilla skeleton with a custom one. Guaranteed to intimidate and creep you out 101%.

State.Author: Rougeshot

State.Name: Looming Lurkers
